fields.name: Report ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the report.

fields.name: Report Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the report.

fields.name: Custom Report Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the custom report layout.

fields.name: Send To Email
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the report is used when sending emails.

fields.name: Use for Email Attachment
fields.tooltip: Specifies that summarized information, such as invoice number, due date, and payment service link, will be inserted in the body of the email that you send.

fields.name: Use for Email Body
fields.tooltip: Specifies that summarized information, such as invoice number, due date, and payment service link, will be inserted in the body of the email that you send.

fields.name: Email Body Layout Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the email body layout that is used.

fields.name: Email Body Layout Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the custom email body layout that is used.

fields.name: Email Body Layout Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the report layout that is used for email body.
